description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to any branch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12). For each Python version, check out the repository with submodules, install Python, set up Graphviz, install project dependencies from requirements.txt, run tests with nose2 and coverage, and upload coverage results to Coveralls.
